items.title: Rare footage captured of Great White shark in Mediterranean Sea
items.dek: A volunteer diver has described shaking as he filmed his encounter with an endangered Great White shark between Tunisia and Sicily.
items.body: A volunteer diver has described shaking as he filmed his encounter with an endangered Great White shark between Tunisia and Sicily.
items.author: IriLine Desk
